title: Alaticaulia thienii
taxonomy: Alaticaulia thienii is a genus of flowering plants in the family Amaryllidaceae. The classification of Alaticaulia thienii places it within the kingdom Plantae, and further categorizes it as a monocot. This classification is due to the plant's characteristics, including its leaf arrangement and the presence of three petals in its flowers. Alaticaulia thienii is often considered a type of bulbous perennial, with growth habits typical of the Amaryllidaceae family. Its classification is still being studied and refined by botanists to better understand its relationships with other plants.
